titleStmt.title: SII 41.131: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 131. (A.R. No. 130 of 1905.) Kaḷakkāḍu. Nāṅgunēri Taluk, Tirunelvēli District. On the north wall of the Satyavagisvara temple at Kaḷakkāḍu.

p.hi: Travncore king (name not given), Kollam 676 = 1500 A.D.

summary.p: Gift of land as dēvadāna to midday service in Puravarīchchuram temple in Kaḷakkāḍu alias Chōḻakulavallipuram in Vāṉava-nāḍu. The king made the gift when he was in his camp at Vaḍachēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu Aruḷicceyal vāṉavaṉ ṉāṭṭu paccāṟṟuppokkuk kaḷakkāṭāṉa coḻakulavallipurāttu nayiṉār puravericcuvaram Uṭaiya nayiṉāṟku Ucciccantipūcai Uṭaṉ kūṭṭi Amutupaṭi kuṟuṇi
Āka naṭakkak kaṟpittu tevatāṉam Āka viṭṭuk koṭutta nilam kaḷakkāṭu tāṉappaṟṟil Āṇṭāṉkuḷam Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟu taṭi nālu nilam mākāṇiyiṉ kiḻ Araikkāl mutal taram Itaṉ vaṭakkut taṭimuṉṟu
nilam Orumā Araikkāṇiyiṉ kiḻ mākāṇi mutal taram Itil nilam Orumāviṉkiḻmuṉṟumā mukkāṇi Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟu taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Orumā mutal taram Itil teṟku nilam Araimā paṉṉiraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟu taṭi mu
ṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikai mutal taram Itil nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ kiḻ muṉṟumā mukkāṇi Itaṉiṭaiviṭṭup pontu vaṭakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araimā muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻa
raiyē muṉṟu mā mukkāṇi mutal taram Itil Araikkāṇīyiṉ kiḻaraiyemuṉṟumā mukkāṇi patiṉ muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟu taṭi muṉṟu nilam mākāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ kiḻ mukkāle mā
kāṇi mutal taram Āka nilam nālumā mukkāṇiyum kaiyyāṇṭu nām koḷḷum koḷmuṟaipāṭāyam Uḷḷatu Eṟperpaṭṭatum kaiyyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭi Aṟunāṟṟu E
ḻupattāṟāmāṇṭu pacāṉamutalukku tevatāṉam Ākak kaiyyāṇṭu koṇṭu Iṉṉilattil kārpacāṉam mutalākiṟa mutal koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi kuṟuṇiyāka pūcai na
ṭattik koṇṭu potumpaṭiyum Ippaṭi pūcainaṭantu Amutu ceytu mutalākiṟa coṟu kuṟuṇiyum nāḷatu mutalukku peṇṭukaḷil Aṅkayakkaṇ nācciyāṟku nāḷtoṟum Ācantiratāra
vaṟ cantatip piṟavecame kuṭuttu potumpaṭiyum kaṟpittu Aṟunūṟṟu Eḻupattāṟāmāṇṭu paṅkūṉimātam patiṉañcān teyti nām vaṭaceriyilvaṭacerip perumāḷ vīṭṭil
viṭāy Iruntu kaṟpikkaiyil It taravu piṭipāṭāka Iṉṉāḷ mutal Ācantiratāravaṟ cantippiṟuvēcamē kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu tevatāṉamāka kaiy
yāṇṭu koṇṭu pūcaiyum naṭatti coṟu kuṟuṇiyum kuṭuttup potumpaṭiyum pāṟka Ippaṭikku kaṇakku kāmaṉ Ayyappaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
